name: Situationship in the City
overview: Nhất An, a confident young man with a bold Y2K style, has his life turned upside down after a chance encounter with CEO Bảo Minh. Their ambiguous relationship soon reveals deeper ties, as the two once shared a fateful bond in a past life—between Nhất An’s spirit and exorcist Bảo Minh.

trailers.title: TRIPLE OF THE CITY (SITUATIONSHIP IN THE CITY) | WEBDRAMA BOYS LOVE 2025
